title: NEXUS RPG: VR Edition
description: The definitive hardcore RPG, now inside your headset. Experience total physical immersion with native VR support, full-motion combat, and a living world that reacts to your presence. Step into the Nexus; don't just play it.
body:
# 🥽 NEXUS RPG: VR Edition

**Stop watching the adventure. Live it.** Nexus RPG VR is a ground-up reconstruction of **[RPG Nexus: Hardcore Progression](https://modrinth.com/modpack/nexusrpg)** , specifically calibrated for total Virtual Reality immersion. This isn't just a port; it’s a professional-grade simulation where every dungeon, every spell, and every blade is felt in your own hands.

![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e13ce49a292e961fb8286e6a4c6559199819670c.png)

---

### TOTAL PHYSICAL IMMERSION

* **Kinetic VR Combat:** Your movements are your weapons. Block, parry, and strike with 1:1 motion tracking. The weight-based combat of the original Nexus now relies on your actual physical skill.
* **Spatial Progression:** Navigate the massive passive skill tree through an intuitive VR interface. Specialize your character while physically towering over your enemies.
* **Scale & Wonder:** Dungeons aren't just "big"—they are monumental. Experience the true scale of massive boss fights and sprawling underground civilizations that can only be appreciated in VR.
* **True Dimensional Presence:** The Nether and The End have been re-engineered for visual comfort and atmospheric dread. Feel the heat of the lava and the vertigo of the void.

### VR OPTIMIZATION PROTOCOL

A smooth frame rate is the difference between immersion and sickness. We've implemented a **"Performance First"** architecture:
* **Stereoscopic Stability:** Fine-tuned for Oculus, Vive, and Index headsets to ensure consistent frame delivery.
* **VR Optimized Shaders:** Includes lighting engines specifically chosen to maintain high fidelity without compromising your refresh rate.
* **Reduced Latency:** Every optimization mod is configured to minimize input lag, ensuring your hand movements are instantaneous.

### A LIVING, BREATHING WORLD

* **Tactile Interactions:** Farm, cook, and interact with the world using natural gestures. The deep culinary and crafting systems are more intuitive when you are doing the work yourself.
* **Spatial Audio Integrity:** Hear the world with 360-degree precision. Track monsters by the sound of their footsteps behind you and feel the roar of dragons in your chest.
* **Unparalleled Exploration:** With native VR support, every biome becomes a destination. Discover hundreds of unique creatures that now stand eye-to-eye with you.

---

### LEGAL & CREDITS
* **Content Creators:** Show the world the Nexus from your eyes. Credit is always appreciated!

**Created by Dinner | Froggy Studio**
